description: A bustling beach scene with dozens of small figures scattered across a sandy shore and wading in blue-green water. Rocky outcroppings and a large fortified structure or castle sit atop cliffs in the background right. Colorful umbrellas and parasols dot the beach. The sky is rendered in broad, loose strokes of blue and white. Small boats or vessels are visible in the distant water. The overall composition is bright and lively with an impressionistic handling of color.
